title: Twitter JP Official Eva themes distributed
display_title: Twitter JP Official Eva themes distributed
wikitext:
[]: Twitter JP: Official Eva themes distributed             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 31, 2012 12:26 am Info (in Japanese): http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1852.html and http://blog.jp.twitter.com/2012/10/blog-post_29.html Theme related stuff here: http://image.eva-info.jp/ All in anticipation for 3.0/Q, of course. Enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Wed Oct 31, 2012 1:21 am I like that Katamari one.

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Wed Oct 31, 2012 6:10 am Wow. I finally get off my butt and find an appropriate Eva picture for my Twitter background, muck around resizing it and being confused by Twitter's confusing uploading ("is.. is it working?") and then these show up the next day. They're pretty nice so I'll probably use them anyway. Thanks for linking 'em.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Oct 31, 2012 9:21 pm Thought it would be theme songs in advance of the soundtrack. I am disappoint.
